input: We optimize ad-creative variants via automated A/B testing — the system selects which of a fixed set of 10 advertising images to show to which segment of website visitors based on click-through-rate signals.

expected.notes: Ad-creative A/B testing on click-through-rate signals does NOT meet Article 5(1)(a) subliminal threshold — the system selects between pre-vetted creative variants on aggregate behavioural signals, not subliminal manipulation outside the awareness of a natural person aiming at material distortion of their behaviour. No Annex III domain triggers (advertising optimization is not employment / essential-services / law-enforcement). No Article 50 transparency obligation (no chatbot / synthetic content generation / deepfake). Mundane marketing-ops AI. Cite: EUR-Lex Regulation (EU) 2024/1689, Article 5(1)(a) chapeau + Article 6(3).
